creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Using wpa_cli on a FreeBSD 9.0-BETA2/amd64 box (Laptop Dell Latitude
E6510, CPU Core-i5 M520, at 2,40 Ghz, 4 GB RAM), CLANG built OS, wpa_cli
crashes shortly after usage with the error message:

wpa_cli: (malloc) /usr/src/lib/libc/stdlib/malloc.c:2636: Failed assertion: "(run->regs_mask[elm] & (1U << bit)) ==0"

This can be forced/triggered faster using the up/down/left/right keys
or tab key.

Happens in sh, csh or bash.
